28679.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们记录了风险投资行业历史上女性招聘率低下的情况。我们发现，备受瞩目的Ellen Pao诉Kleiner Perkins性别歧视案产生了显著的处理效应。在双重差分回归中，我们发现审判后女性风险投资家的招聘率大幅上升，并且这种招聘在更易接受该案件曝光的州更为明显。我们使用州级强制产假福利作为Pao案处理效应接受度的工具变量。我们还表明，Pao案后女性创始人的比例有所增加，但这种增加完全是由女性风险投资家的招聘所驱动的。在Pao案后时期，男性风险投资家投资于女性创始人的倾向没有增加。
28679.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：G3, J01, J16, J7, K31

28678.title: Addressing Biases that Impact Homeowners’ Adoption of Solar Panels
28678.zh_title: 解决影响房主安装太阳能电池板的偏见
28678.authors: Howard Kunreuther, Anna Polise, Quinlyn Spellmeyer
28678.abstract: Solar power is now economically competitive with fossil fuels in many countries, yet relatively few homeowners have installed solar panels on their property. A principal reason for this behavior stems from cognitive biases—such as myopia, inertia and herding—that cause consumers to avoid investing in long-term measures, even those that are financially attractive to them and produce social benefits such as reducing the long-term consequences of climate change. A behavioral risk audit can demonstrate ways to address these cognitive biases, in concert with short-term economic incentives and social influences. We focus on the installation of solar panels, an issue that has relevance to residents in the United States and the European Union, and to property owned by businesses and governments.
28678.zh_abstract: 太阳能发电在许多国家现在已与化石燃料在经济上具有竞争力，然而相对较少的房主在其房产上安装了太阳能电池板。这种行为的一个主要原因源于认知偏见——例如短视、惯性和从众效应——这些偏见导致消费者避免投资于长期措施，即使是那些对他们具有财务吸引力并能产生社会效益（如减少气候变化的长期后果）的措施。行为风险审计可以展示如何结合短期经济激励和社会影响来解决这些认知偏见。我们专注于太阳能电池板的安装，这一问题与美国和欧盟的居民以及企业和政府拥有的财产相关。

28677.title: Robust Decarbonization of the US Power Sector: Policy Options
28677.zh_title: 美国电力部门的稳健脱碳：政策选择
28677.authors: James H. Stock, Daniel N. Stuart
28677.abstract: To reliably achieve deep decarbonization of the US power sector, a candidate policy must perform robustly across a range of possible future trajectories of demand, fossil fuel prices, and prices of new wind and solar capacity. Using a modified version of the NREL ReEDS model with scenarios that span different trajectories of demand, fuel prices, and technology costs, we find that some recently proposed policies can robustly achieve 80% decarbonization (relative to 2005 emissions) or more by 2035, but many do not. The two robustly successful policies are a tradeable performance standard (TPS) and a hybrid Clean Electricity Standard (CES) with a 100% clean target, partial crediting of gas generation, and a $\$40$/mton CO2 alternative compliance payment (ACP) backstop. Both are nearly as cost effective as the emissions-equivalent efficient policy. A $\$40$ carbon tax nearly achieves the robust 80% threshold and, in most scenarios, drives deep decarbonization. A 90% CES (without partial crediting) fails to achieve robust 2035 decarbonization because it need not drive coal out of the system. Simply extending renewable energy tax credits, which are set to expire, does not drive significant decarbonization in most scenarios, nor does relying on increased ambition in green-leaning states.
28677.zh_abstract: 为了可靠地实现美国电力部门的深度脱碳，候选政策必须在需求、化石燃料价格以及新的风能和太阳能容量价格的一系列可能未来轨迹中表现出稳健性。使用修改版的NREL ReEDS模型，并采用涵盖不同需求、燃料价格和技术成本轨迹的情景，我们发现一些最近提出的政策能够稳健地实现到2035年80%的脱碳（相对于2005年排放量）或更多，但许多政策不能。两个稳健成功的政策是可交易绩效标准（TPS）和混合清洁电力标准（CES），后者具有100%清洁目标、对天然气发电的部分信用以及每吨二氧化碳40美元的替代合规付款（ACP）后盾。两者几乎与排放等效的高效政策一样具有成本效益。每吨40美元的碳税几乎达到了稳健的80%阈值，并且在大多数情景下推动了深度脱碳。90%的CES（无部分信用）未能实现稳健的2035年脱碳，因为它不必将煤炭赶出系统。简单地延长即将到期的可再生能源税收抵免，在大多数情景下不会推动显著的脱碳，依赖绿色倾向州增加雄心也是如此。

28676.title: Optimal Deposit Insurance
28676.abstract: This paper studies the optimal determination of deposit insurance when bank runs are possible. We show that the welfare impact of changes in the level of deposit insurance coverage can be generally expressed in terms of a small number of sufficient statistics, which include the level of losses in specific scenarios and the probability of bank failure. We characterize the wedges that determine the optimal ex-ante regulation, which map to asset- and liability-side regulation. We demonstrate how to employ our framework in an application to the most recent change in coverage, which took place in 2008.
28676.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在可能发生银行挤兑的情况下，如何最优地确定存款保险。我们证明，存款保险覆盖水平变化的福利影响通常可以用少数几个充分统计量来表示，这些统计量包括特定情景下的损失水平和银行破产概率。我们刻画了决定最优事前监管的楔子，这些楔子对应于资产端和负债端的监管。我们展示了如何将我们的框架应用于最近一次（2008年）覆盖范围变化的分析中。

28675.title: Flattening the Curve: Pandemic-Induced Revaluation of Urban Real Estate
28675.zh_title: 拉平曲线：疫情引发的城市房地产重估
28675.authors: Arpit Gupta, Vrinda Mittal, Jonas Peeters, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
28675.abstract: We show that the COVID-19 pandemic brought house price and rent declines in city centers, and price and rent increases away from the center, thereby flattening the bid-rent curve in most U.S. metropolitan areas. Across MSAs, the flattening of the bid-rent curve is larger when working from home is more prevalent, housing markets are more regulated, and supply is less elastic. Housing markets predict that urban rent growth will exceed suburban rent growth for the foreseeable future.
28675.zh_abstract: 我们表明，COVID-19疫情导致城市中心的房价和租金下降，而远离中心地区的房价和租金上涨，从而拉平了美国大多数大都市区的投标租金曲线。在都市统计区层面，当居家办公更为普遍、住房市场监管更严格以及住房供应弹性更小时，投标租金曲线的拉平程度更大。住房市场预测，在可预见的未来，城市租金的增长将超过郊区租金的增长。

28674.title: Minority Turnout and Representation under Cumulative Voting. An Experiment.
28674.zh_title: 少数族裔投票率与累积投票制下的代表性：一项实验
28674.authors: Alessandra Casella, Jeffrey Guo, Michelle Jiang
28674.abstract: Under majoritarian election systems, securing participation and representation of minorities remains an open problem, made salient in the US by its history of voter suppression. One remedy recommended by the courts is Cumulative Voting (CV): each voter has as many votes as open positions and can cumulate votes on as few candidates as desired. Theory predicts that CV encourages the minority to overcome obstacles to voting: although each voter is treated equally, CV increases minority's turnout relative to the majority, and the minority's share of seats won. A lab experiment based on a costly voting design strongly supports both predictions.
28674.zh_abstract: 在多数决选举制度下，确保少数族裔的参与和代表性仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，美国历史上压制选民的行为使这一问题尤为突出。法院推荐的一种补救措施是累积投票制：每位选民拥有的票数与待选职位数量相同，并且可以将票数累积投给尽可能少的候选人。理论预测，累积投票制会鼓励少数族裔克服投票障碍：尽管每位选民被平等对待，但累积投票制会提高少数族裔相对于多数族裔的投票率，并增加少数族裔赢得的席位比例。一项基于成本投票设计的实验室实验有力地支持了这两个预测。

28673.title: Ideology and Performance in Public Organizations
28673.zh_title: 公共组织中的意识形态与绩效
28673.authors: Jorg L. Spenkuch, Edoardo Teso, Guo Xu
28673.abstract: We combine personnel records of the United States federal bureaucracy from 1997-2019 with administrative voter registration data to study how ideological alignment between politicians and bureaucrats affects the personnel policies and performance of public organizations. We present four results. (i) Consistent with the use of the spoils system to align ideology at the highest levels of government, we document significant partisan cycles and substantial turnover among political appointees. (ii) By contrast, we find virtually no political cycles in the civil service. The lower levels of the federal government resemble a "Weberian" bureaucracy that appears to be largely protected from political interference. (iii) Democrats make up the plurality of civil servants. Overrepresentation of Democrats increases with seniority, with the difference in career progression being largely explained by positive selection on observables. (iv) Political misalignment carries a sizeable performance penalty. Exploiting presidential transitions as a source of "within-bureaucrat" variation in the political alignment of procurement officers over time, we find that contracts overseen by a misaligned officer exhibit cost overruns that are, on average, 8% higher than the mean overrun. We provide evidence that is consistent with a general "morale effect," whereby misaligned bureaucrats are less motivated.
28673.zh_abstract: 我们将1997-2019年美国联邦官僚机构的人事记录与行政选民登记数据相结合，研究政治家与官僚之间的意识形态一致性如何影响公共组织的人事政策和绩效。我们提出了四个结果。（i）与在政府最高层使用分赃制来统一意识形态的做法一致，我们记录了政治任命官员中显著的党派周期和大量的人员更替。（ii）相比之下，我们在文官系统中几乎没有发现政治周期。联邦政府的较低层级类似于一种“韦伯式”官僚机构，似乎在很大程度上免受政治干预。（iii）民主党人在文官中占多数。民主党人的过度代表性随着资历的增加而增加，职业发展方面的差异在很大程度上可以通过可观测特征的正向选择来解释。（iv）政治错位会带来相当大的绩效损失。利用总统换届作为采购官员政治一致性随时间变化的“官僚内部”变异来源，我们发现，由错位官员监督的合同，其成本超支平均比平均超支高出8%。我们提供的证据与一种普遍的“士气效应”一致，即错位的官僚积极性较低。

28672.title: The Impact of Paid Family Leave on Employers: Evidence from New York
28672.zh_title: 带薪家事假对雇主的影响：来自纽约的证据
28672.authors: Ann P. Bartel, Maya Rossin-Slater, Christopher J. Ruhm, Meredith Slopen, Jane Waldfogel
28672.abstract: We designed and fielded a survey of New York and Pennsylvania firms to study the impacts of New York's 2018 Paid Family Leave policy on employer outcomes. We match each NY firm to a comparable PA firm and use difference-in-difference models to analyze within-match-pair changes in outcomes. We find that PFL leads to an improvement in employers' rating of their ease of handling long employee absences, concentrated in the first policy year and among firms with 50-99 employees. We also find an increase in employee leave-taking in the second policy year, driven by smaller firms.
28672.zh_abstract: 我们设计并开展了一项针对纽约州和宾夕法尼亚州企业的调查，以研究纽约州2018年带薪家事假政策对雇主结果的影响。我们将每家纽约州企业与一家可比的宾夕法尼亚州企业进行匹配，并使用双重差分模型分析匹配对内结果的变化。我们发现，带薪家事假政策导致雇主对处理员工长期缺勤难易程度的评分有所提高，这种改善主要集中在政策实施的第一年以及拥有50-99名员工的企业中。我们还发现，在政策实施的第二年，员工休假有所增加，这主要是由规模较小的企业推动的。
28672.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：I38, J21, J22, J23, J32, J38

28671.title: Immigration and Regional Specialization in AI
28671.zh_title: 移民与人工智能领域的区域专业化
28671.abstract: I examine the specialization of US commuting zones in AI-related occupations over the 2000 to 2018 period. I define AI-related jobs based on keywords in Census occupational titles. Using the approach in Lin (2011) to identify new work, I measure job growth related to AI by weighting employment growth in AI-related occupations by the share of job titles in these occupations that were added after 1990. Overall, regional specialization in AI-related activities mirrors that of regional specialization in IT. However, foreign-born and native-born workers within the sector tend to cluster in different locations. Whereas specialization of the foreign-born in AI-related jobs is strongest in high-tech hubs with a preponderance of private-sector employment, native-born specialization in AI-related jobs is strongest in centers for military and space-related research. Nationally, foreign-born workers account for 55% of job growth in AI-related occupations since 2000. In regression analysis, I find that US commuting zones exposed to a larger increases in the supply of college-educated immigrants became more specialized in AI-related occupations and that this increased specialization was due entirely to the employment of the foreign born. My results suggest that access to highly skilled workers constrains AI-related job growth and that immigration of the college-educated helps relax this constraint.
28671.zh_abstract: 我研究了2000年至2018年期间美国通勤区在人工智能相关职业中的专业化情况。我根据人口普查职业名称中的关键词来定义人工智能相关的工作。使用Lin（2011）的方法来识别新工作，我通过将人工智能相关职业的就业增长乘以这些职业中1990年后新增职位名称的占比，来衡量与人工智能相关的工作增长。总体而言，人工智能相关活动的区域专业化反映了信息技术领域的区域专业化。然而，该领域内的外国出生和本土出生的工人倾向于聚集在不同的地点。外国出生者在人工智能相关工作中的专业化程度在私营部门就业占主导的高科技中心最强，而本土出生者在人工智能相关工作中的专业化程度在军事和太空相关研究中心最强。在全国范围内，自2000年以来，外国出生的工人占人工智能相关职业就业增长的55%。在回归分析中，我发现，那些面临大学学历移民供应增长更大的美国通勤区，在人工智能相关职业上变得更加专业化，并且这种专业化的增强完全是由外国出生者的就业所驱动的。我的结果表明，获得高技能工人的机会限制了人工智能相关工作的增长，而受过大学教育的移民有助于缓解这一约束。

28670.title: Medicaid and Fiscal Federalism During the COVID-19 Pandemic
28670.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间的医疗补助与财政联邦主义
28670.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Benedic N. Ippolito, Stan Veuger
28670.abstract: We analyze the effects of the COVID-19 pandemic on state and local government finances, with an emphasis on health spending needs and the role of the Medicaid program. We arrive at three conclusions. First, we find that nationwide, and over the entirety of the federal budget window, the enhanced federal matching funds are of roughly the same magnitude as expected increases in state Medicaid costs. There is a difference in timing, however, as projected relief funds are more concentrated in the near term than projected spending needs. Second, we show that there is substantial variation in states’ exposure to increases in Medicaid program costs. Third, we evaluate the extent to which federal aid has been targeted at states with large increases in Medicaid costs. We show that the enhanced Medicaid matching funds are quite weakly correlated with variations in states’ cost increases. In contrast, the state aid formula in the American Recovery Plan Act appears, to at least a moderate degree, to direct dollars toward states with large increases in their Medicaid enrollments.
28670.zh_abstract: 我们分析了COVID-19疫情对州和地方政府财政的影响，重点关注卫生支出需求和医疗补助计划的作用。我们得出三个结论。首先，我们发现，在全国范围内，并且在整个联邦预算窗口期内，增加的联邦配套资金规模大致与预期的州医疗补助成本增加相当。然而，在时间上存在差异，因为预计的救济资金比预计的支出需求更集中在近期。其次，我们表明，各州在医疗补助计划成本增加方面的风险敞口存在显著差异。第三，我们评估了联邦援助在多大程度上针对医疗补助成本大幅增加的州。我们表明，增加的医疗补助配套资金与各州成本增加的差异相关性非常弱。相比之下，《美国救援计划法案》中的州援助公式至少在中等程度上似乎将资金导向了医疗补助注册人数大幅增加的州。

28669.title: The Insurance Value of Financial Aid
28669.authors: Kristy Fan, Tyler J. Fisher, Andrew A. Samwick
28669.abstract: Financial aid programs enable students from families with fewer financial resources to pay less to attend college than other students from families with greater financial resources. When income is uncertain, a means-tested financial aid formula that requires more of an Expected Family Contribution (EFC) when income and assets are high and less of an EFC when income and assets are low provides insurance against that uncertainty. Using a stochastic, life-cycle model of consumption and labor supply, we show that the insurance value of financial aid is substantial. Across a range of parameterizations, we calculate that financial aid would have to increase by enough to reduce the net cost of attendance by 30 to 80 percent to compensate families for the loss of the income- and asset-contingent elements of the current formula. This compensating variation is net of the negative welfare consequences of the disincentives to work and save inherent in the means-testing of financial aid. Replacing just the "financial aid tax" on assets with a lump sum would also reduce welfare.
28669.zh_abstract: 经济资助项目使得来自经济资源较少家庭的学生能够比来自经济资源较多家庭的其他学生支付更少的大学费用。当收入不确定时，一项基于经济状况调查的经济资助公式，在收入和资产高时要求更高的预期家庭贡献，在收入和资产低时要求更低的预期家庭贡献，这为这种不确定性提供了保险。通过使用一个包含消费和劳动供给的随机生命周期模型，我们表明经济资助的保险价值是巨大的。在一系列参数化设定下，我们计算出，经济资助必须增加足够多，以使净就读成本降低30%到80%，才能补偿家庭因当前公式中收入和资产依赖要素的缺失而造成的损失。这种补偿性变化是扣除经济状况调查中固有的工作和储蓄抑制因素所带来的负面福利后果之后的净值。仅用一次性总付替代资产上的“经济资助税”也会降低福利。

28667.title: Web of Power: How Elite Networks Shaped War and Politics in China
28667.zh_title: 权力网络：精英网络如何塑造中国的战争与政治
28667.authors: Ying Bai, Ruixue Jia, Jiaojiao Yang
28667.abstract: Scholars have argued that powerful individuals can exert influence on the path of a nation’s development. Yet, the process through which individuals can have an effect on macro-level political economy outcomes remains unclear. This study uses the deadliest civil war in modern history, the Taiping Rebellion (1850–1864), to elucidate how one individual—Zeng Guofan—employed his personal elite networks to organize an army to suppress the rebellion, and how these networks would affect the nation’s power distribution. Two findings stand out: (i) counties that already had more pre-war elites in Zeng’s networks experienced an increase in soldier deaths after he took power; and (ii) post-war political power shifted significantly toward the home counties of these very elites, creating a less balanced national-level power distribution. Our findings highlight how micro-level elite networks can influence national politics and societal power distribution, shedding new light on the relationship between elites, war and the state.
28667.zh_abstract: 学者们认为，有权势的个人能够对国家发展路径施加影响。然而，个人对宏观政治经济结果产生影响的过程仍不清楚。本研究利用现代历史上最致命的内战——太平天国运动（1850-1864年），阐明了一个人——曾国藩——如何利用其个人精英网络组织军队镇压叛乱，以及这些网络如何影响国家权力分配。两个发现尤为突出：（i）在曾国藩掌权后，其网络中战前精英人数已经较多的县，士兵死亡人数增加；（ii）战后政治权力显著向这些精英的家乡县转移，导致国家层面的权力分配更加不平衡。我们的发现强调了微观层面的精英网络如何影响国家政治和社会权力分配，为精英、战争与国家之间的关系提供了新的见解。
28667.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：D74, H11, L14, N45, O11

28666.title: The Production and Consumption of Social Media
28666.zh_title: 社交媒体的生产与消费
28666.authors: Apostolos Filippas, John J. Horton, Elliot Lipnowski, Prasanna Parasurama
28666.abstract: We model social media as collections of users producing and consuming content. Users value consuming content but due to scarce attention they may not value all content from other users. Users also value receiving attention, creating the incentive to attract an audience by producing valuable content but also through attention bartering—users mutually becoming each others’ audience. Attention bartering shapes substantially the patterns of production and consumption on social media, explains key features of social media behavior and platform decision-making, and yields sharp predictions that are consistent with data we collect from #EconTwitter. We conduct Twitter and Instagram user surveys that yield additional direct evidence in support of attention bartering, and we discuss the implications of attention bartering for the design of social media platforms.
28666.zh_abstract: 我们将社交媒体建模为生产和消费内容的用户集合。用户重视消费内容，但由于注意力稀缺，他们可能不重视来自其他用户的所有内容。用户也重视获得关注，这激励他们通过生产有价值的内容来吸引受众，但也通过注意力交换——用户相互成为彼此的受众。注意力交换在很大程度上塑造了社交媒体上的生产和消费模式，解释了社交媒体行为和平台决策的关键特征，并产生了与我们从#EconTwitter收集的数据一致的清晰预测。我们进行了Twitter和Instagram用户调查，获得了支持注意力交换的额外直接证据，并讨论了注意力交换对社交媒体平台设计的影响。

28665.title: Civil Service Exams and Organizational Performance: Evidence from the Pendleton Act
28665.zh_title: 公务员考试与组织绩效：来自《彭德尔顿法案》的证据
28665.abstract: Competitive exams are a standard method for selecting civil servants. Yet, there is limited evidence on their effectiveness. We digitize personnel and financial data to study the impacts of the 1883 Pendleton Act, which mandated exams for some employees in the largest US customs-collection districts. Although the act improved targeted employees’ professional background and reduced turnover, it did not increase cost-effectiveness in customs revenue collection. Moreover, it incentivized hiring in exam-exempted positions, distorting districts’ hierarchical structures. These results illustrate how, by triggering countervailing organizational responses, policies that succeed at improving specific organizational aspects might nevertheless fail to improve overall performance.
28665.zh_abstract: 竞争性考试是选拔公务员的标准方法。然而，关于其有效性的证据有限。我们数字化了人事和财务数据，以研究1883年《彭德尔顿法案》的影响，该法案要求美国最大的海关征收区的部分雇员参加考试。尽管该法案改善了目标雇员的专业背景并降低了离职率，但并未提高海关税收征收的成本效益。此外，它激励了在考试豁免职位上的招聘，扭曲了各区的层级结构。这些结果说明了，通过引发抵消性的组织反应，成功改善特定组织方面的政策可能仍然无法提高整体绩效。

28664.title: Do Workfare Programs Live Up to Their Promises? Experimental Evidence from Cote D’Ivoire
28664.zh_title: 工作福利计划是否兑现了承诺？来自科特迪瓦的实验证据
28664.authors: Marianne Bertrand, Bruno Crépon, Alicia Marguerie, Patrick Premand
28664.abstract: Workfare programs are one of the most popular social protection and employment policy instruments in the developing world. They evoke the promise of efficient targeting, as well as immediate and lasting impacts on participants’ employment, earnings, skills and behaviors. This paper evaluates contemporaneous and post-program impacts of a public works intervention in Côte d’Ivoire. The program was randomized among urban youths who self-selected to participate and provided seven months of employment at the formal minimum wage. Randomized subsets of beneficiaries also received complementary training on basic entrepreneurship or job search skills. During the program, results show limited impacts on the likelihood of employment, but a shift toward wage jobs, higher earnings and savings, as well as changes in work habits and behaviors. Fifteen months after the program ended, savings stock remain higher, but there are no lasting impacts on employment or behaviors, and only limited impacts on earnings. Machine learning techniques are applied to assess whether program targeting can improve. Significant heterogeneity in impacts on earnings is found during the program but not post-program. Departing from self-targeting improves performance: a range of practical targeting mechanisms achieve impacts close to a machine learning benchmark by maximizing contemporaneous impacts without reducing post-program impacts. Impacts on earnings remain substantially below program costs even under improved targeting.
28664.zh_abstract: 工作福利计划是发展中国家最受欢迎的社会保护和就业政策工具之一。它们承诺实现有效瞄准，以及对参与者就业、收入、技能和行为产生即时和持久的影响。本文评估了科特迪瓦一项公共工程干预措施的同期和项目后影响。该计划在自我选择参与的都市青年中随机实施，提供了七个月的最低工资正式就业。部分受益者还随机获得了基础创业或求职技能的补充培训。在项目期间，结果显示对就业可能性的影响有限，但出现了向工资工作的转变、更高的收入和储蓄，以及工作习惯和行为的变化。项目结束十五个月后，储蓄存量仍然较高，但对就业或行为没有持久影响，对收入的影响也有限。应用机器学习技术评估项目瞄准是否可以改进。在项目期间发现了收入影响的显著异质性，但项目后没有。偏离自我瞄准提高了绩效：一系列实用的瞄准机制通过最大化同期影响而不减少项目后影响，实现了接近机器学习基准的影响。即使在改进瞄准的情况下，收入影响仍远低于项目成本。
28664.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：C93, H53, I38, J24, O12

28663.title: The Alpha Beta Gamma of the Labor Market
28663.zh_title: 劳动力市场的阿尔法、贝塔和伽马
28663.authors: Victoria Gregory, Guido Menzio, David G. Wiczer
28663.abstract: Based on patterns of employment transitions, we identify three different types of workers in the US labor market: α's β's and γ's. Workers of type α make up over half of all workers, are most likely to remain on the same job for more than 2 years and, when they become unemployed, typically find a new job within 1 quarter. Workers of type γ comprise less than one-fifth of workers, have a low probability of staying on the same job for more than 2 years and, when they become unemployed, face a high probability of remaining jobless for more than 1 year. Workers of type β are in between αs and γ's. The earnings losses caused by displacement are relatively small and transitory for α-workers, while they are large and persistent for γ-workers. During the Great Recession, excess unemployment for α-workers rose by little and was reabsorbed quickly; unemployment for γ-workers rose by 20 percentage points and was not reabsorbed 4 years after its peak. We use a search-theoretic model of the labor market to rationalize the different patterns of employment transitions across types. The model naturally explains both the variation in the consequences of job displacement across types, and the variation in the dynamics of unemployment during the Great Recession. Our view is that several puzzling micro and macro phenomena about the labor market are driven by the behavior of the small group of γ-workers.
28663.zh_abstract: 基于就业转换模式，我们在美国劳动力市场中识别出三种不同类型的工人：α型、β型和γ型。α型工人占所有工人的一半以上，最有可能在同一份工作上停留超过两年，并且当他们失业时，通常在一个季度内找到新工作。γ型工人占工人总数的不到五分之一，在同一份工作上停留超过两年的概率较低，并且当他们失业时，面临超过一年仍处于失业状态的高概率。β型工人介于α型和γ型之间。由失业导致的收入损失对α型工人来说相对较小且短暂，而对γ型工人来说则巨大且持久。在大衰退期间，α型工人的超额失业率上升幅度很小且很快被吸收；γ型工人的失业率上升了20个百分点，并且在达到峰值四年后仍未恢复。我们使用一个搜索理论模型来解释不同工人类型之间就业转换模式的差异。该模型自然地解释了不同类型工人失业后果的差异，以及大衰退期间失业动态的变化。我们的观点是，关于劳动力市场的几个令人困惑的微观和宏观现象是由小部分γ型工人的行为驱动的。

28662.title: Terrorism and Political Attitudes: Evidence from European Social Surveys
28662.zh_title: 恐怖主义与政治态度：来自欧洲社会调查的证据
28662.authors: Giovanni Peri, Daniel I. Rees, Brock Smith
28662.abstract: Since the turn of the last century, nationalistic political parties have been gaining support in Europe. Over the same period, terror attacks have increased. Using data from European Social Surveys (ESS), we examine the effects of terror attacks involving at least one fatality on attitudes towards immigrants and government institutions. Comparing within-country responses to the ESS shortly before and after fatal terror attacks, we find little evidence of a shift in attitudes against immigrants. Consistent with “rally-around-the flag” effects documented by political scientists, ESS respondents living in the region that was attacked tend to express more trust in parliament and more satisfaction with the national government in the post- as compared to the pre-attack period. Similarly, we find evidence that particularly salient terror attacks can produce nationwide rally-around-the-flag effects.
28662.zh_abstract: 自上世纪之交以来，民族主义政党在欧洲的支持率不断上升。在同一时期，恐怖袭击有所增加。利用欧洲社会调查的数据，我们研究了造成至少一人死亡的恐怖袭击对移民态度和政府机构态度的影响。通过比较同一国家内恐怖袭击前后不久进行的欧洲社会调查的回应，我们发现几乎没有证据表明对移民的态度发生了转变。与政治学家记录的“团结在旗帜下”效应一致，生活在遭受袭击地区的欧洲社会调查受访者在袭击后时期比袭击前时期更倾向于表达对议会的更多信任和对国家政府的更高满意度。同样，我们发现证据表明，特别突出的恐怖袭击可以在全国范围内产生“团结在旗帜下”效应。

28661.title: Persuading with Anecdotes
28661.authors: Nika Haghtalab, Nicole Immorlica, Brendan Lucier, Markus Mobius, Divyarthi Mohan
28661.abstract: We study a model of social learning and communication using hard anecdotal evidence. There are two Bayesian agents (a sender and a receiver) who wish to communicate. The receiver must take an action whose payoff depends on their personal preferences and an unknown state of the world. The sender has access to a collection of n samples correlated with the state of the world, which we think of as specific anecdotes or pieces of evidence, and can send exactly one of these samples to the receiver in order to influence her choice of action. Importantly, the sender's personal preferences may differ from the receiver's, which affects the seller's strategic choice of which anecdote to send.
28661.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个使用硬轶事证据进行社会学习和沟通的模型。有两个贝叶斯主体（发送者和接收者）希望进行沟通。接收者必须采取一个行动，其收益取决于他们的个人偏好和一个未知的世界状态。发送者可以访问一组与世界状态相关的n个样本，我们将其视为特定的轶事或证据片段，并且可以恰好向接收者发送其中一个样本，以影响她的行动选择。重要的是，发送者的个人偏好可能与接收者的不同，这影响了发送者策略性地选择发送哪个轶事。

28660.title: “I Still Haven’t Found What I’m Looking For”: Evidence of Directed Search from a Field Experiment
28660.zh_title: “我仍未找到我所追寻的”：来自实地实验的定向搜寻证据
28660.authors: Haoran He, David Neumark, Qian Weng
28660.abstract: We explore the impact of wage offers on job applications, testing implications of the directed search model and trying to distinguish it from random search. We use a field experiment conducted on a Chinese job board, with real jobs for which we randomly varied the wage offers across three ranges. We find that higher wage offers raise application rates overall, which is consistent with directed search but can also arise with random search. We also find that higher wage offers raise application rates for job seekers with wage offers above reservation wages, and that – among the latter – the increase in application rates is stronger for those with higher reservation wages. The latter two types of evidence are consistent with directed search but not random search. Hence, our evidence lends support to directed search models.
28660.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了工资报价对求职申请的影响，检验了定向搜寻模型的推论，并试图将其与随机搜寻区分开来。我们利用在中国一个招聘网站上进行的实地实验，针对真实职位，将工资报价随机设定在三个不同区间。我们发现，更高的工资报价总体上提高了申请率，这与定向搜寻模型一致，但也可能出现在随机搜寻中。我们还发现，更高的工资报价提高了那些工资报价高于保留工资的求职者的申请率，并且——在后一类求职者中——申请率的提高对于保留工资更高的人更为显著。后两类证据与定向搜寻模型一致，但与随机搜寻不一致。因此，我们的证据支持了定向搜寻模型。

28659.title: The Welfare Effect of a Consumer Subsidy with Price Ceilings: The Case of Chinese Cell Phones
28659.zh_title: 价格上限下消费者补贴的福利效应：以中国手机为例
28659.abstract: Subsidies to consumers may cause firms to charge higher prices, which offsets consumer benefits from subsidies. We study a subsidy program design that mitigates such price increases by making products' eligibility for a subsidy dependent on firms' commitment to price ceilings. To quantify the importance of such competition for eligibility, we develop a structural model and an estimation procedure that accommodate binding pricing constraints. We find that competition for eligibility mitigates the price increases arising from the subsidy and even leads to a reduction in prices for some products. It improves consumer and total surpluses while limiting government subsidy payments.
28659.zh_abstract: 对消费者的补贴可能导致企业提高价格，从而抵消消费者从补贴中获得的收益。我们研究了一种补贴计划设计，该设计通过使产品获得补贴的资格取决于企业对价格上限的承诺，来缓解此类价格上涨。为了量化这种资格竞争的重要性，我们开发了一个结构模型和一个能够处理具有约束力的定价限制的估计程序。我们发现，资格竞争缓解了补贴引起的价格上涨，甚至导致某些产品价格下降。它在限制政府补贴支出的同时，提高了消费者剩余和总剩余。

28658.title: Arbitrage Capital of Global Banks
28658.authors: Alyssa G. Anderson, Wenxin Du, Bernd Schlusche
28658.abstract: We show that the role of unsecured, short-term wholesale funding for global banks has changed significantly in the post-financial-crisis regulatory environment. Global banks mainly use such funding to finance liquid, near risk-free arbitrage positions—in particular, the interest on excess reserves arbitrage and the covered interest rate parity arbitrage. In this environment, we examine the response of global banks to a large negative wholesale funding shock as a result of the U.S. money market mutual fund reform implemented in 2016. In contrast to past episodes of wholesale funding dry-ups, we find that the primary response of global banks to the reform was a cutback in arbitrage positions that relied on unsecured funding, rather than a reduction in loan provision.
28658.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在金融危机后的监管环境下，无担保短期批发融资对全球银行的作用已发生显著变化。全球银行主要利用此类融资来为流动性强、近乎无风险的套利头寸提供资金——特别是超额准备金利息套利和抛补利率平价套利。在这种环境下，我们考察了全球银行对2016年美国货币市场共同基金改革所导致的重大负面批发融资冲击的反应。与过去批发融资枯竭的事件相比，我们发现，全球银行对改革的主要反应是削减依赖无担保融资的套利头寸，而不是减少贷款发放。
28658.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, F3, G2

28657.title: Productivity Growth and Workers’ Job Transitions: Evidence from Censal Microdata
28657.zh_title: 生产率增长与工人的工作转换：来自普查微观数据的证据
28657.authors: Elias Albagli, Mario Canales, Chad Syverson, Matias Tapia, Juan Wlasiuk
28657.abstract: A large body of work has highlighted the importance of employment reallocation as a driver of aggregate productivity growth, but there is little direct evidence on the extent of this process at the firm-worker level. We use an administrative matched employer-employee census for Chile to provide novel insights into the relationship between job transitions and productivity variation across firms, and to quantify the contribution of different worker groups to aggregate reallocation. As many theories would predict, worker flows from lower- to higher-productivity firms are larger than those of the opposite sign. Empirically, however, this is only marginally so. Almost half of all transitions occur “down the firm productivity ladder.” This process is also highly heterogeneous along several dimensions. Up-the-ladder flows are more likely for direct job-to-job transitions than those that pass through non-employment, and among firms in the upper end of the productivity distribution. They are also much more likely for young, high-skilled workers, whose job transitions comprise in an accounting sense the lion’s share of aggregate productivity change. Interestingly, workers with the highest job turnover rates contribute proportionally the least to aggregate productivity changes. Aggregate reallocation gains are therefore mostly explained by a relatively narrow subset of job transitions. Put together, this evidence implies that the productivity mechanics of job reallocation yield a net benefit, but this hides massive and heterogeneous gross flows underneath.
28657.zh_abstract: 大量研究强调了就业重新配置作为总体生产率增长驱动因素的重要性，但关于这一过程在企业-工人层面的程度，直接证据很少。我们使用智利行政性的雇主-雇员匹配普查数据，为工作转换与企业间生产率差异之间的关系提供新的见解，并量化不同工人群体对总体重新配置的贡献。正如许多理论所预测的那样，从低生产率企业流向高生产率企业的工人流量大于相反方向的流量。然而，从实证上看，这种差异只是微弱的。几乎一半的转换发生在“企业生产率阶梯的下行方向”。这一过程在多个维度上也表现出高度异质性。与经历非就业期的转换相比，直接的工作间转换更可能发生在生产率阶梯的上行方向，并且在生产率分布顶端的企业中更为常见。对于年轻、高技能的工人来说，这种上行流动的可能性也大得多，从核算意义上讲，他们的工作转换构成了总体生产率变化的主要部分。有趣的是，工作转换率最高的工人对总体生产率变化的贡献比例最小。因此，总体重新配置收益主要由一个相对狭窄的工作转换子集来解释。综合来看，这些证据意味着工作重新配置的生产率机制产生了净收益，但这掩盖了其背后巨大且异质的总流量。
28657.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LS, PR；JEL：D2, E23, J2, J6, L11

28656.title: The Great Transition: Kuznets Facts for Family-Economists
28656.zh_title: 大转型：家庭经济学家的库兹涅茨事实
28656.authors: Jeremy Greenwood, Nezih Guner, Ricardo Marto
28656.abstract: The 20th century beheld a dramatic transformation of the family. Some Kuznets style facts regarding structural change in the family are presented. Over the course of the 20th century in the United States fertility declined, educational attainment waxed, housework fell, leisure increased, jobs shifted from blue to white collar, and marriage waned. These trends are also observed in the cross-country data. A model is developed, and then calibrated, to address the trends in the US data. The calibration procedure is closely connected to the underlying economic logic. Three drivers of the great transition are considered: neutral technological progress, skill-biased technological change, and drops in the price of labor-saving household durables.
28656.zh_abstract: 20世纪见证了家庭的戏剧性转变。本文提出了一些关于家庭结构变化的库兹涅茨式事实。在20世纪的美国，生育率下降，教育程度提高，家务劳动减少，休闲增加，工作从蓝领转向白领，婚姻衰落。这些趋势在跨国数据中也能观察到。我们开发了一个模型，然后进行校准，以解释美国数据中的这些趋势。校准过程与基本的经济逻辑紧密相连。我们考虑了大转型的三个驱动因素：中性技术进步、技能偏向型技术变革以及节省劳动力的家庭耐用品价格的下降。

28655.title: Diversity and Team Performance in a Kenyan Organization
28655.zh_title: 肯尼亚一家组织中的多样性与团队绩效
28655.authors: Benjamin Marx, Vincent Pons, Tavneet Suri
28655.abstract: We present the results from a field experiment on team diversity. Individuals working as door-to-door canvassers for a non-profit organization were randomly assigned a teammate, a supervisor, and a list of individuals to canvass. This created random variation within teams in the degree of horizontal diversity (between teammates), vertical diversity (between teammates and their supervisor) and external diversity (between teams and the individuals they canvassed). We observe team-level measures of performance and find that horizontal ethnic diversity decreases performance, while vertical diversity often improves performance, and external diversity has no effect. The data on time use suggests that horizontally homogeneous teams organized tasks in a more efficient way, while vertically homogeneous teams exerted lower effort.
28655.zh_abstract: 我们展示了一项关于团队多样性的实地实验结果。在一家非营利组织担任上门宣传员的工作人员被随机分配了一名队友、一名主管以及一份需要上门宣传的人员名单。这就在团队内部创造了在横向多样性（队友之间）、纵向多样性（队友与其主管之间）和外部多样性（团队与其宣传对象之间）程度上的随机变异。我们观察了团队层面的绩效指标，发现横向的种族多样性降低了绩效，而纵向多样性通常能提高绩效，外部多样性则没有影响。关于时间使用的数据表明，横向同质的团队以更有效的方式组织任务，而纵向同质的团队则付出了较低的努力。
28655.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, POL；JEL：D22, J24, L22, M54, O12

28654.title: Repricing Avalanches
28654.abstract: We present a menu-cost pricing model with a large but finite number n of firms. A firm’s nominal price increase lowers other firms’ relative prices, thereby inducing further nominal price increases. The distribution of these repricing avalanches converges as n→∞ to a mixture of Generalized Poisson Distributions (GPD), with an index of dispersion (variance/mean) that is a function of a single variable θ that is determined by the equilibrium of the continuous limit. The index of dispersion explodes as θ→1. We calibrate the model to the U.S. experience during 1988–2005 and obtain a θ surprisingly close to unity. Simulations show that a GPD fits well the distribution of avalanches but that, once we account for the dynamics, the multiplier effect derived from a firm adjusting prices by paying menu costs is even larger. We also show that the model can account for the positive relationship between inflation level and volatility that was observed in 1988–2005 in the U.S.
28654.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个包含大量但有限数量n家企业的菜单成本定价模型。一家企业的名义价格上涨会降低其他企业的相对价格，从而引发进一步的名义价格上涨。当n→∞时，这些重新定价雪崩的分布收敛于广义泊松分布（GPD）的混合分布，其离散指数（方差/均值）是单个变量θ的函数，而θ由连续极限的均衡决定。当θ→1时，离散指数激增。我们将模型校准到美国1988-2005年的经验，得到的θ惊人地接近1。模拟显示，GPD能很好地拟合雪崩的分布，但一旦我们考虑到动态因素，由企业通过支付菜单成本调整价格所产生的乘数效应甚至更大。我们还表明，该模型可以解释1988-2005年在美国观察到的通胀水平与波动性之间的正相关关系。

28653.title: Choosing the Future: Markets, Ethics, and Rapprochement in Social Discounting
28653.zh_title: 选择未来：社会贴现中的市场、伦理与和解
28653.abstract: This paper provides a critical review of the literature on choosing social discount rates (SDRs) for public cost-benefit analysis. We discuss two dominant approaches, the first based on market prices, and the second based on intertemporal ethics. While both methods have attractive features, neither is immune to criticism. The market-based approach is not entirely persuasive even if markets are perfect, and faces further headwinds once the implications of market imperfections are recognised. By contrast, the ‘ethical’ approach – which relates SDRs to marginal rates of substitution implicit in a single planner's intertemporal welfare function – does not rely exclusively on markets, but raises difficult questions about what that welfare function should be. There is considerable disagreement on this matter, which translates into enormous variation in the evaluation of long-run payoffs. We discuss the origins of these disagreements, and suggest that they are difficult to resolve unequivocally. This leads us to propose a third approach that recognises the immutable nature of some normative disagreements, and proposes methods for aggregating diverse theories of intertemporal social welfare. We illustrate the application of these methods to social discounting, and suggest that they may help us to move beyond long-standing debates that have bedevilled this field.
28653.zh_abstract: 本文对公共成本效益分析中选择社会贴现率（SDR）的文献进行了批判性评述。我们讨论了两种主流方法，第一种基于市场价格，第二种基于跨期伦理。虽然两种方法都有吸引人的特点，但都难免受到批评。基于市场的方法即使在市场完美的情况下也不完全令人信服，并且一旦认识到市场不完善的影响，就会面临进一步的阻力。相比之下，“伦理”方法——将SDR与单一规划者跨期福利函数中隐含的边际替代率联系起来——并不完全依赖市场，但引发了关于该福利函数应该是什么的难题。在这个问题上存在相当大的分歧，这转化为对长期回报评估的巨大差异。我们讨论了这些分歧的根源，并认为它们难以明确解决。这促使我们提出第三种方法，该方法承认某些规范性分歧的不可改变性，并提出了聚合不同跨期社会福利理论的方法。我们说明了这些方法在社会贴现中的应用，并建议它们可能有助于我们超越困扰该领域的长期争论。

28652.title: Parental Skills, Assortative Mating, and the Incidence of Autism Spectrum Disorder
28652.zh_title: 父母技能、选型婚配与自闭症谱系障碍发病率
28652.authors: N. Meltem Daysal, Todd E. Elder, Judith K. Hellerstein, Scott A. Imberman, Chiara Orsini
28652.abstract: We use rich administrative data from Denmark to assess medical theories that autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a heritable condition transmitted through underlying parental skills. Positing that occupational choices reflect skills, we create two separate occupation-based skill measures and find that these measures are associated with ASD incidence among children, especially through the father’s side. We also assess the empirical relevance of assortative mating based on skill, concluding that intertemporal changes in assortative mating explain little of the increase in ASD diagnoses in recent decades.
28652.zh_abstract: 我们利用丹麦丰富的行政数据来评估医学理论，即自闭症谱系障碍是一种通过潜在父母技能遗传的疾病。假设职业选择反映技能，我们创建了两个独立的基于职业的技能衡量指标，并发现这些指标与儿童自闭症谱系障碍发病率相关，尤其是通过父亲一方。我们还评估了基于技能的选型婚配的经验相关性，得出结论：近几十年来选型婚配的跨期变化几乎无法解释自闭症谱系障碍诊断率的上升。

28651.title: Correcting Perceived Social Distancing Norms to Combat COVID-19
28651.zh_title: 纠正感知的社交距离规范以抗击COVID-19
28651.authors: James Allen IV, Arlete Mahumane, James Riddell IV, Tanya Rosenblat, Dean Yang, Hang Yu
28651.abstract: Can informing people of high community support for social distancing encourage them to do more of it? In theory, the impact of such an intervention on social distancing is ambiguous, and depends on the relative magnitudes of free-riding and perceived-infectiousness effects. We randomly assigned a treatment providing information on true high rates of community social distancing support. We estimate impacts on social distancing, measured using a combination of self-reports and reports of others. While experts surveyed in advance expected the treatment to increase social distancing, we find that its average effect is close to zero and significantly lower than expert predictions. The treatment’s effect is heterogeneous, as predicted by theory: it decreases social distancing where current COVID-19 cases are low (where free-riding dominates), but increases it where cases are high (where the perceived-infectiousness effect dominates).
28651.zh_abstract: 告知人们社区对社交距离的高度支持能否鼓励他们更多地这样做？理论上，这种干预对社交距离的影响是模糊的，取决于搭便车效应和感知传染性效应的相对大小。我们随机分配了一项提供真实高社区社交距离支持率信息的处理。我们估计了对社交距离的影响，使用自我报告和他人报告相结合的方式进行衡量。虽然事先接受调查的专家预期该处理会增加社交距离，但我们发现其平均效应接近于零，且显著低于专家预测。该处理的效果是异质性的，正如理论所预测：在当前COVID-19病例较低的地区（搭便车效应占主导），它减少了社交距离；但在病例较高的地区（感知传染性效应占主导），它增加了社交距离。

28650.title: Cognitive Biases: Mistakes or Missing Stakes?
28650.zh_title: 认知偏差：错误还是缺乏激励？
28650.authors: Benjamin Enke, Uri Gneezy, Brian Hall, David C. Martin, Vadim Nelidov, Theo Offerman, Jeroen van de Ven
28650.abstract: Despite decades of research on heuristics and biases, empirical evidence on the effect of large incentives – as present in relevant economic decisions – on cognitive biases is scant. This paper tests the effect of incentives on four widely documented biases: base rate neglect, anchoring, failure of contingent thinking, and intuitive reasoning in the Cognitive Reflection Test. In laboratory experiments with 1,236 college students in Nairobi, we implement three incentive levels: no incentives, standard lab payments, and very high incentives that increase the stakes by a factor of 100 to more than a monthly income. We find that response times – a proxy for cognitive effort – increase by 40% with very high stakes. Performance, on the other hand, improves very mildly or not at all as incentives increase, with the largest improvements due to a reduced reliance on intuitions. In none of the tasks are very high stakes sufficient to de-bias participants, or come even close to doing so.
28650.zh_abstract: 尽管对启发式和偏差进行了数十年的研究，关于大额激励（如相关经济决策中存在的）对认知偏差影响的实证证据仍然匮乏。本文测试了激励对四种广泛记录的偏差的影响：基础率忽视、锚定效应、条件思维失败以及认知反射测试中的直觉推理。在内罗毕对1236名大学生进行的实验室实验中，我们实施了三种激励水平：无激励、标准实验室支付和非常高激励（将赌注提高100倍至超过月收入）。我们发现，在非常高激励下，反应时间（认知努力的代理指标）增加了40%。另一方面，随着激励增加，表现改善非常轻微或根本没有改善，最大的改善是由于减少了对直觉的依赖。在所有任务中，非常高激励都不足以消除参与者的偏差，甚至无法接近消除。

28698.title: Structural Models: Inception and Frontier
28698.abstract: We discuss the past, present and future of the structural approach in empirical microeconomics, starting with its inception in the 1970s and 1980s. Our focus is on the use of the structural approach in labor economics, broadly deﬁned to include population economics, human capital and related ﬁelds. In the hopes to reach a wider audience that might not be as familiar with the pillars of the structural approach, we ﬁrst provide an overview of well-known features, setting the stage for a more up-to-date discussion of current developments. We discuss how to identify the need for a structural model, and key steps involved in how to formulate one. We also discuss issues of identiﬁcation and estimation and highlight advantages and disadvantages of this approach, including the controversial issue of external validity. We then describe the current frontier of this approach, which increasingly reﬂects integration eﬀorts with “design-based” strategies. This integration provides opportunities to both, validate structural models and enhance the credibility of their identiﬁcation. We highlight why, whenever possible, it is best to pursue both of these goals, reserving some of the credible exogenous variation for identiﬁcation and some for validation. While quasi-experimental variation can be useful in pursuit of both of these goals, we discuss why RCTs provide a ﬁrst best opportunity in terms of out-of-sample validation. We conclude with thoughts about the future of the structural approach.
28698.zh_abstract: 我们讨论了实证微观经济学中结构方法的过去、现在和未来，从其起源于20世纪70年代和80年代开始。我们的重点在于结构方法在劳动经济学中的应用，广义上包括人口经济学、人力资本及相关领域。为了吸引可能不熟悉结构方法支柱的更广泛读者，我们首先概述了其众所周知的特征，为更及时地讨论当前发展奠定基础。我们讨论了如何识别对结构模型的需求，以及构建结构模型所涉及的关键步骤。我们还讨论了识别和估计的问题，并强调了这种方法的优缺点，包括外部有效性这一有争议的问题。然后，我们描述了该方法当前的前沿，它日益反映出与“基于设计”策略的整合努力。这种整合为验证结构模型和增强其识别可信度提供了机会。我们强调，只要可能，最好同时追求这两个目标，将一些可信的外生变异保留用于识别，另一些用于验证。虽然准实验变异有助于实现这两个目标，但我们讨论了为什么随机对照试验在样本外验证方面提供了最优机会。最后，我们提出了对结构方法未来的思考。

28697.title: The Distribution of Investor Beliefs, Stock Ownership and Stock Returns
28697.zh_title: 投资者信念分布、股票所有权与股票收益
28697.authors: Gikas Hardouvelis, Georgios Karalas, Dimitri Vayanos
28697.abstract: We study theoretically and empirically the relationship between investor beliefs, ownership dispersion and stock returns. We find that high dispersion, measured by high breadth or low Herfindahl index, forecasts returns positively for large stocks, as in Chen, Hong and Stein (2002), but negatively for small stocks. We explain that relationship in a difference-of-opinion model in which stocks differ in the size of investor disagreements and the extent of belief polarization. These differences are characterized by range and kurtosis, respectively. Proxying investor beliefs by analyst forecasts, we find that range and kurtosis affect ownership dispersion in the way that our model predicts.
28697.zh_abstract: 我们从理论和实证上研究了投资者信念、所有权分散度与股票收益之间的关系。我们发现，对于大盘股，以高广度或低赫芬达尔指数衡量的高分散度能正向预测收益，如Chen, Hong和Stein (2002)所述，但对于小盘股则负向预测收益。我们在一个意见分歧模型中解释了这种关系，该模型中股票在投资者分歧的大小和信念极化的程度上存在差异。这些差异分别由范围和峰度来刻画。通过使用分析师预测作为投资者信念的代理变量，我们发现范围和峰度以我们的模型预测的方式影响所有权分散度。

28696.title: The International Transmission of Local Economic Shocks Through Migrant Networks
28696.zh_title: 通过移民网络的本地经济冲击国际传导
28696.authors: María Esther Caballero, Brian Cadena, Brian K. Kovak
28696.abstract: Using newly validated data on geographic migration networks, we study how labor demand shocks in the United States propagate across the border with Mexico. We show that the large exogenous decline in US employment brought about by the Great Recession affected demographic and economic outcomes in Mexican communities that were highly connected to the most affected markets in the US. In the Mexican locations with strong initial ties to the hardest hit US migrant destinations, return migration increased, emigration decreased, and remittance receipt declined. These changes significantly increased local employment and hours worked, but wages were unaffected. Investment in durable goods and children's education also slowed in these communities. These findings document the effects in Mexico when potential migrants lose access to a strong US labor market, providing insight regarding the potential impacts of stricter US migration restrictions.
28696.zh_abstract: 利用新验证的地理迁移网络数据，我们研究了美国劳动力需求冲击如何通过美墨边境传播。我们表明，由大衰退带来的美国就业大幅外生下降，影响了与受冲击最严重的美国市场高度关联的墨西哥社区的人口和经济结果。在与受冲击最严重的美国移民目的地有紧密初始联系的墨西哥地区，回迁移民增加，向外移民减少，汇款收入下降。这些变化显著提高了当地就业和工作时长，但工资未受影响。这些社区的耐用品投资和儿童教育也放缓了。这些发现记录了当潜在移民失去进入强劲美国劳动力市场的机会时对墨西哥的影响，为更严格的美国移民限制可能产生的影响提供了见解。
28696.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：F22, J21, J23, J61, R23

28695.title: Wage Flexibility Under Sectoral Bargaining
28695.zh_title: 部门谈判下的工资灵活性
28695.abstract: Sectoral contracts in many European countries set wage floors for different occupation groups. In addition, employers often pay a wage premium (or wage cushion) to individual workers. We use administrative data from Portugal, linked to collective bargaining agreements, to study the interactions between wage floors and wage cushions and quantify the impact of sectoral wage floors. Although wages exhibit a “spike” at the wage floor, a typical worker receives a 20% premium over the floor, with larger cushions for older and better-educated workers and at higher-productivity firms. Cushions also allow wages to covary with firm-specific productivity, even within sectoral agreements. Contract negotiations tend to raise all wage floors proportionally, with increases that reflect average productivity growth among covered firms. As floors rise, however, cushions are compressed, leading to an average passthrough rate of only about 50%. We find no evidence of employment responses to floor increases. Finally, we use a series of counterfactual simulations to show that real wage reductions during the recent financial crisis arose through reductions in real wage floors, reductions in real cushions, and a re-allocation of workers to lower wage floors. Offsetting these effects was a rapid rise in education of new cohorts, which in the absence of other factors would have led to rising real wages.
28695.zh_abstract: 许多欧洲国家的部门合同为不同职业群体设定了工资下限。此外，雇主通常向个别工人支付工资溢价（或工资缓冲）。我们使用葡萄牙的行政数据，并与集体谈判协议相关联，研究工资下限与工资缓冲之间的相互作用，并量化部门工资下限的影响。尽管工资在工资下限处出现“尖峰”，但典型工人获得的溢价为下限的20%，年龄较大和教育程度较高的工人以及生产率较高的企业拥有更大的缓冲。缓冲还允许工资随企业特定生产率而变化，即使在部门协议内也是如此。合同谈判倾向于按比例提高所有工资下限，其增长反映了受覆盖企业的平均生产率增长。然而，随着下限上升，缓冲被压缩，导致平均传导率仅为约50%。我们没有发现就业对下限增长有反应的证据。最后，我们使用一系列反事实模拟表明，近期金融危机期间实际工资的下降源于实际工资下限的降低、实际缓冲的减少以及工人向较低工资下限的重新分配。抵消这些效应的是新进入队列教育水平的快速提高，如果没有其他因素，这本来会导致实际工资上升。

28694.title: Barriers to Global Capital Allocation
28694.authors: Bruno Pellegrino, Enrico Spolaore, Romain Wacziarg
28694.abstract: Observed international investment positions and cross-country heterogeneity in rates of return to capital are hard to reconcile with frictionless capital markets. In this paper, we develop a theory of international capital allocation: a multi-country dynamic spatial general equilibrium model in which the entire network of cross-border investment is endogenously determined. Our model features cross-country heterogeneity in fundamental risk, a demand system for international assets, and frictions that cause segmentation in international capital markets. We measure frictions affecting international investment and apply our model to data from nearly 100 countries, using a new dataset of international capital taxes and cultural, geographic and linguistic distances between countries (geopoliticaldistance.org). Our model performs well in reproducing the composition of international portfolios, the cross-section of home bias and rates of return to capital, and other key features of international capital markets. Finally, we carry out counterfactual exercises: we show that barriers to international investment reduce world output by almost 7% and account for nearly half of the observed cross-country differences in capital stock per employee.
28694.zh_abstract: 观察到的国际投资头寸和各国资本回报率的异质性难以与无摩擦的资本市场相协调。在本文中，我们发展了一个国际资本配置理论：一个多国动态空间一般均衡模型，其中跨境投资的整个网络是内生决定的。我们的模型具有各国基础风险异质性、国际资产需求系统以及导致国际资本市场分割的摩擦。我们衡量影响国际投资的摩擦，并将我们的模型应用于近100个国家的数据，使用一个新的国际资本税以及国家间文化、地理和语言距离数据集（geopoliticaldistance.org）。我们的模型在再现国际投资组合构成、本土偏好和资本回报率的横截面特征以及国际资本市场的其他关键特征方面表现良好。最后，我们进行了反事实模拟：我们表明，国际投资障碍使世界产出减少近7%，并解释了观察到的各国人均资本存量差异的近一半。
28694.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, POL；JEL：E22, E44, F2, F3, F4, G15, O4

28693.title: Risky Business Cycles
28693.authors: Susanto Basu, Giacomo Candian, Ryan Chahrour, Rosen Valchev
28693.abstract: We identify a shock that explains the bulk of fluctuations in the equity risk premium, and show that the shock also explains a large fraction of the business-cycle comovements of output, consumption, employment, and investment. Recessions induced by the shock are associated with a reallocation away from full-time labor positions, and towards part-time and flexible contract workers. We explain the data using a novel real model with labor market frictions and fluctuations in risk appetite. Since safer factors of production have lower marginal products in equilibrium, a “flight-to-safety” from riskier to safer factors precipitates a macroeconomic recession.
28693.zh_abstract: 我们识别出一个冲击，它解释了股权风险溢价的大部分波动，并表明该冲击也解释了产出、消费、就业和投资的商业周期协同变动的大部分。由该冲击引发的衰退与劳动力从全职岗位向兼职和灵活合同工人的重新配置相关。我们使用一个包含劳动力市场摩擦和风险偏好波动的新型真实模型来解释数据。由于较安全的生产要素在均衡中具有较低的边际产出，从风险较高的要素“逃向安全”会引发宏观经济衰退。

28692.title: Do Intermediaries Matter for Aggregate Asset Prices?
28692.zh_title: 中介机构对总体资产价格重要吗？
28692.abstract: Poor financial health of intermediaries coincides with low asset prices and high risk premiums. Is this because intermediaries matter for asset prices, or simply because their health correlates with economy-wide risk aversion? In the first case, return predictability should be more pronounced for asset classes in which households are less active. We provide evidence supporting this prediction, suggesting that a quantitatively sizable fraction of risk premium variation in several large asset classes such as credit or MBS is due to intermediaries. Movements in economy-wide risk aversion create the opposite pattern, and we find this channel also matters.
28692.zh_abstract: 中介机构较差的财务健康状况与较低的资产价格和较高的风险溢价同时出现。这是因为中介机构对资产价格有影响，还是仅仅因为它们的健康状况与经济整体的风险厌恶程度相关？在第一种情况下，对于家庭参与度较低的资产类别，回报可预测性应该更为显著。我们提供了支持这一预测的证据，表明在信贷或抵押贷款支持证券等几个大型资产类别中，风险溢价变动的相当大一部分可量化部分是由中介机构造成的。经济整体风险厌恶程度的变动则产生了相反的模式，我们发现这一渠道也很重要。

28691.title: Discount Rate Risk in Private Equity: Evidence from Secondary Market Transactions
28691.zh_title: 私募股权中的贴现率风险：来自二级市场交易的证据
28691.authors: Brian Boyer, Taylor D. Nadauld, Keith P. Vorkink, Michael S. Weisbach
28691.abstract: Standard measures of private equity performance based on cash flows overlook discount rate risk. An index constructed from prices paid in secondary market transactions indicates that private equity discount rates vary considerably. While the standard alpha for our index is zero, measures of performance based on cash flow data for funds in our index are large and positive. To illustrate that results are not driven by idiosyncrasies of private equity secondary markets, we obtain similar results using cash flows and returns of synthetic funds that invest in small cap stocks. Ignoring variation in PE discount rates can lead to a misallocation of capital.
28691.zh_abstract: 基于现金流的标准私募股权绩效衡量指标忽略了贴现率风险。根据二级市场交易价格构建的指数表明，私募股权贴现率波动很大。虽然我们指数的标准阿尔法值为零，但基于我们指数中基金现金流数据的绩效衡量指标却很大且为正。为了说明结果并非由私募股权二级市场的特殊性驱动，我们使用投资于小盘股的合成基金的现金流和回报率得到了类似的结果。忽略私募股权贴现率的变化可能导致资本配置不当。

28690.title: Quantifying Brand Loyalty: Evidence from the Cigarette Market
28690.zh_title: 量化品牌忠诚度：来自卷烟市场的证据
28690.authors: Philip DeCicca, Donald S. Kenkel, Feng Liu, Jason Somerville
28690.abstract: We exploit a quasi-experiment created when New York State began in 2011 to tax cigarettes sold on Native American Reservations. The regime change represents a unique opportunity to quantify brand loyalty because it almost doubled the price of premium-brand cigarettes, while Native brands were still untaxed. We use data from two different sources—the New York State Adult Tobacco Survey and the Nielsen Homescan Panel. We find that the increase in relative prices led to substantial declines in premium cigarette purchases. However, even among the premium consumers with the most to gain from switching, about three-quarters remained brand loyal.
28690.zh_abstract: 我们利用纽约州于2011年开始对美洲原住民保留地销售的卷烟征税时产生的准实验。这一制度变化为量化品牌忠诚度提供了一个独特的机会，因为它几乎使优质品牌卷烟的价格翻了一番，而本土品牌仍未被征税。我们使用了来自两个不同来源的数据——纽约州成人烟草调查和尼尔森家庭扫描面板。我们发现，相对价格的上涨导致优质卷烟购买量大幅下降。然而，即使在那些从转换品牌中获益最多的优质消费者中，仍有大约四分之三的人保持了品牌忠诚。

28689.title: Priority-based Assignment with Reserves and Quotas
28689.zh_title: 基于优先级的分配：预留名额与配额
28689.abstract: We study priority-based assignment problems with distributional and diversity objectives. Our work provides an axiomatic characterization of a general class of choice rules which are based on type-specific reserves and quotas. The choice rules in the class differ by the order in which applicants are considered for units reserved for different types. We show that a particular reserves- and quotas-based choice rule, where all applicants are first considered for units reserved for their own types, uniquely minimizes priority violations in this class.
28689.zh_abstract: 我们研究了具有分配和多样性目标的基于优先级的分配问题。我们的工作为一类基于特定类型预留名额和配额的通用选择规则提供了公理化特征描述。该类中的选择规则因申请人被考虑分配至为不同类型预留名额的顺序而异。我们表明，在该类中，一种特定的基于预留名额和配额的选择规则——即所有申请人首先被考虑分配至为其自身类型预留的名额——能唯一地最小化优先级违规。

28688.title: College as a Marriage Market
28688.authors: Lars Kirkebøen, Edwin Leuven, Magne Mogstad, Jack Mountjoy
28688.abstract: College graduates tend to marry each other. We use detailed Norwegian data to show that strong assortativity further arises by institution and field of study, especially among high earners from elite programs. Admission discontinuities reveal that enrollment itself, rather than selection, primarily drives matching by institution and field among the college-educated, and that these matches can be economically consequential. Elite professional programs, in particular, propel marginally admitted women into elite household formation: they earn substantially more themselves and match with higher-earning elite partners, becoming much more likely to join the top percentiles of household earnings while also reducing fertility. Marginal elite admission for men yields no change in partner earnings or fertility. College matchmaking effects are concentrated among students who attend the same institution at the same time, and are larger when opposite-sex peers are more abundant, indicating search costs in the marriage market.
28688.zh_abstract: 大学毕业生倾向于彼此结婚。我们使用详细的挪威数据表明，按院校和专业划分，尤其是在来自精英项目的高收入者中，存在强烈的同质性匹配。录取断点显示，在受过大学教育的人群中，是入学本身而非选择主要驱动了按院校和专业的匹配，并且这些匹配可能具有重要的经济后果。特别是，精英专业项目将勉强被录取的女性推向了精英家庭的形成：她们自身收入大幅提高，并与收入更高的精英伴侣匹配，从而更有可能跻身家庭收入最高的百分位，同时生育率下降。男性被精英项目勉强录取对其伴侣收入或生育率没有影响。大学的婚配效应集中在同时就读同一院校的学生中，并且当异性同龄人更充足时效应更大，这表明婚姻市场中存在搜寻成本。

28687.title: What Triggers Stock Market Jumps?
28687.zh_title: 是什么触发了股市的跳跃？
28687.authors: Scott R. Baker, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Marco C. Sammon
28687.abstract: We examine next-day newspaper accounts of large daily jumps in 19 national stock markets to assess their proximate cause, clarity as to cause, and geographic source. Our sample of over 8,000 jumps, reaching back to 1900 for the United States, yields several novel findings. First, jumps have become more grounded in readily perceived news developments over the past century. Second, news about monetary policy and government spending accounts for a highly disproportionate share of upward jumps. Third, upward jumps attributed to monetary policy and government spending shocks are much more likely after a stock market crash. In this sense, the “Fed put” emerged decades before the 1990s, characterizes fiscal policy as well, and extends to other countries. Fourth, jumps triggered by monetary policy foreshadow much lower volatility than other jumps. Finally, leading newspapers attribute 38 percent of jumps in their own national stock markets to US economic and policy developments. The US role in this regard dwarfs that of Europe and China.
28687.zh_abstract: 我们研究了19个国家股票市场每日大幅跳跃的次日报纸报道，以评估其直接原因、原因的明确性以及地理来源。我们的样本包含超过8000次跳跃，其中美国的数据可追溯至1900年，这产生了几个新颖的发现。首先，在过去一个世纪中，跳跃越来越基于易于感知的新闻动态。其次，关于货币政策和政府支出的新闻在向上跳跃中占据了极不相称的份额。第三，归因于货币政策和政府支出冲击的向上跳跃在股市崩盘后更有可能发生。从这个意义上说，“美联储看跌期权”在20世纪90年代之前就已出现，也适用于财政政策，并扩展到其他国家。第四，由货币政策触发的跳跃预示着远低于其他跳跃的波动性。最后，主要报纸将本国股市38%的跳跃归因于美国的经济和政策动态。美国在这方面的作用远超欧洲和中国。
28687.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E52, E62, F36, G12, G18

28686.title: Crime and Gender Segregation: Evidence from the Bogota "Pico y Genero" Lockdown
28686.zh_title: 犯罪与性别隔离：来自波哥大“性别单双号”封锁政策的证据
28686.authors: Brian G. Knight, Maria Mercedes Ponce de Leon, Ana Tribin
28686.abstract: This paper investigates the link between gender and crime using information from a gender-based lockdown policy in Bogota Colombia during the pandemic. Under the policy, men were allowed out on odd days and women on even days, and we investigate whether overall crime rates differed and whether crime was lower on women-only days. We compare crime in Bogota to other cities and, within Bogota, the gender-based lockdown period to weeks with other lockdown policies. Our key findings are that crime rates are higher during the gender-based lockdown policy and that this is driven by more crime involving male victims and on men-only days. There is no evidence that higher crime on men-only days is offset by less crime on women-only days. The higher crimes on men-only days is driven by robbery, stolen cars and motorcycles, and homicides. We find higher sexual crimes on women-only days and an increase in domestic violence on both types of days. Taken together, our results suggest that gender segregation, if anything, tends to increase crime.
28686.zh_abstract: 本文利用疫情期间哥伦比亚波哥大实施的一项基于性别的封锁政策信息，调查了性别与犯罪之间的联系。在该政策下，男性被允许在奇数日外出，女性在偶数日外出，我们研究了总体犯罪率是否存在差异，以及仅在女性日犯罪率是否更低。我们将波哥大的犯罪率与其他城市进行比较，并在波哥大内部，将基于性别的封锁期与其他封锁政策实施的周进行比较。我们的主要发现是，在基于性别的封锁政策期间犯罪率更高，并且这主要是由涉及男性受害者的犯罪以及在仅男性日发生的更多犯罪所驱动的。没有证据表明仅男性日更高的犯罪被仅女性日更低的犯罪所抵消。仅男性日更高的犯罪主要由抢劫、盗窃汽车和摩托车以及凶杀案驱动。我们发现仅女性日性犯罪更高，并且两种类型的日子家庭暴力均有所增加。综合来看，我们的结果表明，性别隔离（如果有的话）往往会增加犯罪。
28686.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J1, K4, O1

28685.title: Collateral Heterogeneity and Monetary Policy Transmission: Evidence from Loans to SMEs and Large Firms
28685.zh_title: 抵押品异质性与货币政策传导：来自中小企业和大企业贷款的证据
28685.authors: Cecilia R. Caglio, R. Matthew Darst, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan
28685.abstract: We study the role of heterogeneous financial frictions in investment and credit channels of monetary policy, using firm-bank matched administrative data for the U.S. We find that collateral heterogeneity in loan contracts explains the relaxing/tightening of financial constraints in response to monetary shocks. Small and risky firms rely on their earnings and intangibles as collateral, which means their leverage is backed by procyclical earnings. Monetary expansions lower the marginal cost of funds for these firms and expand their borrowing capacity. Monetary policy can be highly effective in economies dominated by small firms pledging their earnings and intangibles as collateral, even though these firms have high default risk.
28685.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国的企业-银行匹配行政数据，研究了异质性金融摩擦在货币政策的投资和信贷渠道中的作用。我们发现，贷款合同中的抵押品异质性解释了金融约束对货币冲击的放松/收紧。小型和风险较高的企业依赖其收益和无形资产作为抵押品，这意味着它们的杠杆率由顺周期的收益支撑。货币扩张降低了这些企业的资金边际成本，并扩大了它们的借贷能力。在由以其收益和无形资产作为抵押品的小型企业主导的经济体中，货币政策可能非常有效，即使这些企业具有较高的违约风险。
28685.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E44, E52, G20, O16

28684.title: Diversity and Performance in Entrepreneurial Teams
28684.zh_title: 创业团队的多样性与绩效
28684.authors: Sophie Calder-Wang, Paul A. Gompers, Kevin Huang
28684.abstract: We study the role of diversity and performance in the entrepreneurial teams. We exploit a unique dataset of MBA students who participated in a required course to propose and start a real micro-business that allows us to examine horizontal diversity (i.e., within the team) as well as vertical diversity (i.e., team to faculty advisor) and their effect on performance. The design of the course allows for identification of the causal implications of horizontal and vertical diversity. The course was run in multiple cohorts in otherwise identical formats except for the team formation mechanism used. In several cohorts, students were allowed to choose their teams from among students in their section (roughly 90 students). In other cohorts, students were randomly assigned to teams based upon a computer algorithm. In the cohorts that were allowed to choose, we find strong selection based upon shared attributes. Among the randomly-assigned teams, greater diversity along the intersection of gender and race/ethnicity significantly reduced performance. However, the negative effect of this diversity is alleviated in cohorts in which teams are endogenously formed. Finally, we find that teams with more female members perform substantially better when their faculty section leader was also female. Because the gender of the faculty section leader is exogenous to the gender make-up of the entrepreneurial team, the positive performance effects can be interpreted as causal. These findings suggest that diversity policies should take adequate consideration of the multiple dimensions of diversity.
28684.zh_abstract: 我们研究了创业团队中多样性与绩效的作用。利用一个独特的数据集，该数据集来自MBA学生参与的一门必修课程，要求他们提出并启动一个真实的微型企业，这使我们能够考察水平多样性（即团队内部）以及垂直多样性（即团队与导师之间）及其对绩效的影响。课程设计允许识别水平多样性和垂直多样性的因果影响。该课程以多期学员形式开展，除团队组建机制外，其他格式完全相同。在几期学员中，学生被允许从其所在班级（约90名学生）中选择自己的团队。在其他期学员中，学生根据计算机算法被随机分配到团队。在允许自由选择的期次中，我们发现基于共同属性的强烈选择效应。在随机分配的团队中，性别与种族/民族交叉维度的更大多样性显著降低了绩效。然而，这种多样性的负面效应在团队内生形成的期次中得到缓解。最后，我们发现，当团队所在班级的导师为女性时，女性成员比例更高的团队表现显著更好。由于班级导师的性别相对于创业团队的性别构成是外生的，因此积极的绩效影响可以被解释为因果关系。这些发现表明，多样性政策应充分考虑多样性的多个维度。

28683.title: Combating Political Corruption with Policy Bundles
28683.zh_title: 用政策组合打击政治腐败
28683.abstract: In this paper, we develop a dynamic model of politicians who can engage in corruption. The model offers important insights into what determines corruption and how to design policy to combat it. We estimate the model using data from Brazil to measure voters' willingness to pay for various commonly-proposed anti-corruption policies, such as increasing audit probabilities, increasing politicians' wages, and extending term limits. We document that while voters have a high willingness to pay for audit policies, due to their effectiveness in reducing corruption, a multi-pronged approach that bundles certain policies can achieve similar welfare gains at a fraction of the cost.
28683.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们构建了一个政治家可能参与腐败的动态模型。该模型为理解腐败的决定因素以及如何设计政策来打击腐败提供了重要见解。我们利用巴西的数据估计了该模型，以衡量选民对各种常见反腐败政策的支付意愿，例如提高审计概率、增加政治家工资以及延长任期限制。我们记录到，尽管选民对审计政策有很高的支付意愿，因为其在减少腐败方面有效，但一种将某些政策捆绑在一起的多管齐下的方法可以以较低的成本实现类似的福利收益。

28699.title: The Impact of Domestic Travel Bans on COVID-19 is Nonlinear in Their Duration
28699.zh_title: 国内旅行禁令对COVID-19的影响与其持续时间呈非线性关系
28699.authors: Fiona Burlig, Anant Sudarshan, Garrison Schlauch
28699.abstract: Domestic mobility restrictions to control the spread of COVID-19 are widespread in developing countries, and have trapped millions of migrant workers in hotspot cities. We show that bans can increase cumulative infections relative to a counterfactual sans restrictions. A SEIR model shows bans’ impacts are nonlinear in duration. We empirically test this hypothesis using a natural experiment in India as well as data from China, Indonesia, the Philippines, South Africa, and Kenya. Although very short and long restrictions limit the spread of disease, moderately lengthy restrictions substantially increase infections. This underscores the importance of considering duration in mobility-restricting policy decisions in developing countries.
28699.zh_abstract: 在发展中国家，为控制COVID-19传播而实施的国内出行限制措施十分普遍，并已导致数百万农民工被困在疫情热点城市。我们表明，与无限制的反事实情况相比，禁令可能增加累计感染人数。一个SEIR模型显示，禁令的影响与其持续时间呈非线性关系。我们利用印度的自然实验以及来自中国、印度尼西亚、菲律宾、南非和肯尼亚的数据，对这一假设进行了实证检验。尽管非常短和非常长的限制措施能限制疾病传播，但中等长度的限制措施会显著增加感染人数。这强调了在发展中国家制定限制出行政策时考虑持续时间的重要性。

28668.title: Surviving the Fintech Disruption
28668.zh_title: 在金融科技颠覆中生存
28668.authors: Wei Jiang, Yuehua Tang, Rachel (Jiqiu) Xiao, Vincent Yao
28668.abstract: This paper studies how demand for labor reacts to financial technology (fintech) shocks based on comprehensive databases of fintech patents and firm job postings in the U.S. during the past decade. We first develop a measure of fintech exposure at the occupation level by intersecting the textual information in job task descriptions and fintech patents. We then document a significant decline of job postings in the most exposed occupations, and an increase in industry as well as geographical concentration of these occupations. Firms resort to an upskilling strategy in face of the fintech disruption, requiring “combo” (finance and software) skills, higher education attainments, and longer work experiences in the hiring of fintech-exposed jobs. Financial firms and those with high innovation outputs are able to offset the disruptive effect from the fintech shock. Among innovating firms, however, only inventors (but not acquisition-driven innovators) experience growth in hiring, sales, investment, and enjoy better returns on assets.
28668.zh_abstract: 本文基于过去十年美国金融科技专利和企业职位发布的综合数据库，研究劳动力需求如何应对金融科技冲击。我们首先通过交叉职位任务描述和金融科技专利中的文本信息，构建了职业层面的金融科技暴露度指标。然后，我们记录了暴露度最高的职业的职位发布显著下降，以及这些职业的行业和地理集中度上升。面对金融科技颠覆，企业采取技能提升策略，在招聘金融科技暴露岗位时要求“组合”（金融和软件）技能、更高的教育程度和更长的工作经验。金融企业和创新产出高的企业能够抵消金融科技冲击的颠覆效应。然而，在创新企业中，只有发明者（而非收购驱动的创新者）在招聘、销售、投资方面实现增长，并获得更好的资产回报率。
